name: Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces sweetened condensed milk (up to 30 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Ginger Crumb Crust.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the condensed milk, lime zest and juice, egg yolks, salt, and optional citric acid. Mix until smooth and pour into the baked crust. Chill the pie for 4-24 hours.
3. Whip the heavy cream in another bowl until it forms soft peaks. Gradually add the sugar and continue whipping until stiff peaks form. Decoratively spread the whipped cream over the filling and sprinkle with optional lime rind. Serve immediately. It may not cut neatly, but no one will care.
Makes one 9-inch pie or eight 8-inch tart pieces.
